name: Spinach Canapes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the spinach and drain any excess water.
2. When cooled, add the beaten eggs to the spinach mixture.
3. Mix well and then add the butter, stuffing cubes, and grated cheese. Combine everything thoroughly.
4. Form small balls from the mixture and freeze until ready to use.
5. Bake in a 400°F (200°C) oven for 10 minutes.
6. Serve hot.
